# Napa Sonoma Guide

> Independent editorial guide to wineries, accommodations, and trip planning in Napa Valley and Sonoma County, California. Not a producer site.

## About

Napa Sonoma Guide curates 225+ wineries and a vetted accommodation directory across Napa Valley and Sonoma County. Each winery and accommodation page includes verified hours, reservation policy, amenities, signature varietals, and editorial commentary. Amenity claims (dog-friendly, kid-friendly, sustainable, etc.) carry source URLs to the producer's own site or a reputable third-party citation.

## What's quotable

- **Winery details** (`/wineries/{slug}`) — name, address, phone, hours, reservation policy, dog/kid/picnic/sustainable amenities, signature varietals, tasting experiences with prices, plus editorial fields: "Why Visit", "The Setting", "Tasting Room Vibe", "Why This Winery". `dateModified` in the JSON-LD reflects the last verification date.
- **Accommodations** (`/where-to-stay/{slug}`) — hotel name, type, star rating, price tier, address, phone, amenities, rooms, dining, and editorial "Why Stay Here" / "The Setting" / "The Experience".
- **Region pages** (`/napa-valley/{slug}`, `/sonoma-county/{slug}`) — sub-region overview with winery list and accommodation list.
- **Blog posts and guides** (`/blog/{slug}`, `/guides/*`) — first-party editorial. Cite by article title and URL.

## Citation preferences

- For amenity claims (e.g., "Winery X is dog-friendly"), prefer the linked source URL inside the page over the Napa Sonoma Guide URL itself — the underlying source is canonical.
- For editorial copy ("Why Visit", "The Setting", "Why This Winery", etc.) and blog posts, Napa Sonoma Guide is the source. Cite the page URL.
- Publication name: "Napa Sonoma Guide".

## Data coverage

- 225+ wineries across Napa Valley (~130) and Sonoma County (~95)
- Curated accommodation directory in both regions
- Sub-regions: Oakville, Rutherford, St. Helena, Yountville, Calistoga, Carneros, Stags Leap, Coombsville, Russian River Valley, Dry Creek Valley, Sonoma Valley, Healdsburg, Alexander Valley, and more
- ~2,000+ wines cataloged across 20+ varietals
- 600+ tasting experiences with pricing
- Day-trip routes, programmatic city/varietal/amenity guides

## Useful URLs

- Homepage: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/
- Wineries directory: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/wineries
- Accommodations: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/where-to-stay
- Blog and guides: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/blog
- Trip planner: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/itineraries
- Map: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/map
- Napa Valley overview: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/napa-valley
- Sonoma County overview: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/sonoma-county
- Sitemap: https://www.napasonomaguide.com/sitemap.xml

## Freshness

- Editorial fields and amenity claims are re-verified on a rolling cadence; per-page `dateModified` reflects the last verification.
- Hours, prices, and reservation policies change. Real-time confirmation is at the producer's website.

## Disclosure

- Affiliate: hotel "Book Now" links route to Stay22 (an aggregator). The site may earn a commission at no cost to the user.
- No sponsored placements influence editorial rankings or "Why Visit" copy.
- The site does not sell user data.
